title: GG&T Fakemon Pack [Cobblemon]
description: A datapack that adds a plethora of custom-made fakemon to Cobblemon!
body:
# GG&T Fakemon Pack

### An addon for [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon).

![Look at them all!](https://i.imgur.com/5hE4z4v.png)

This resource pack adds **dozens** (*currently 80+*) of fakemon designed by [Dusken](https://modrinth.com/user/Duskgusting), [Gingledoof](https://modrinth.com/user/gingledoof0) and friends.

### Overview

Each pokémon comes fully fledged with models, stats, movepools, unique spawns, evolutions and some are even animated!

**More information on each of them can be found [here](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1seawDkRqxkLBggXoFQ99utW6uIIovmUDUXP0JXgwbdQ/edit?usp=sharing).**

This fakemon pack has two fossilmons! To resurrect Upsigenia, combine Fossilized Fish with Brain Coral Block. To resurrect Protobi, combine Fossilized Bird with Pointed Dripstone.

## Installation

Put `GG&T Pack` in your resourcepacks folder and in your world's datapacks folder.

--------------

***NOTE:*** You must enable the `GG&T pack` in your resourcepacks folder to get custom pokémon to properly display.

***FOR SERVERS:*** Servers only need the data pack, but all players will still need `GG&T Pack` in their resourcepacks folder for it to display properly.
